text.title: growth-cold-outreach Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-cold-outreach as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: No personalization — sending the same template to everyone.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reads as spam. Personalization is what distinguishes cold outreach from email blasts. Even batch-level personalization (company name, industry) improves open rates by 20–30%.

failure-mode.description: Sending from primary domain without warmup.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A single spam complaint can blacklist the primary domain, breaking all transactional email (receipts, notifications, support replies).
